nodes.label: Google Fonts (Albert Sans, Fira Code, Libertinus Serif, Material Symbols Rounded)
Hero Image - Personal Profile Banner
nodes.author: Farhan Kurnia Pratama
nodes.description: Dark-themed personal profile hero banner featuring a centered portrait photo with rounded corners, full name 'Farhan Kurnia Pratama' in bold monospace typography, a website link (fkp.my.id) with globe icon, and a GitHub handle (@farhnkrnapratma) with GitHub icon. Background is near-black (#0d1117 style). Design is minimal and professional.

nodes.label: Portrait Photo - Farhan Kurnia Pratama
nodes.author: Farhan Kurnia Pratama
nodes.description: Headshot of a young man wearing glasses and a plaid shirt with a lanyard, displayed in a white rounded-corner frame centered in the hero banner.

nodes.label: Name Text - Farhan Kurnia Pratama
nodes.description: Bold monospace white text reading 'Farhan Kurnia Pratama' displayed prominently below the portrait photo in the hero banner.

nodes.label: Website Link - fkp.my.id
nodes.description: A globe icon followed by the text 'fkp.my.id', indicating the personal website URL of the site owner.

nodes.label: GitHub Handle - @farhnkrnapratma
nodes.description: GitHub icon followed by the handle '@farhnkrnapratma', indicating the GitHub profile of the site owner.

nodes.label: Dark Theme Design
nodes.description: The hero image uses a near-black dark background (#0d1117 approximate) with white text and icons, consistent with a dark mode design aesthetic.

nodes.label: Universed Color Palette Screenshot
nodes.description: A screenshot from color.adobe.com showing a color palette named 'Universed'. The palette contains 5 colors: #7765D9 (purple, RGB 119,101,217), #66D9A3 (mint green, RGB 102,217,163), #D9CA66 (golden yellow, RGB 217,202,102), #D97566 (terracotta/coral, RGB 217,117,102), and #6E6A84 (muted purple-gray, RGB 110,106,132). The layout uses a grid of large color swatches with hex codes and RGB values labeled below each swatch.

nodes.label: Color #7765D9 - Purple
nodes.description: The primary purple color swatch from the Universed palette. Hex: #7765D9, RGB: 119, 101, 217.

nodes.label: Color #66D9A3 - Mint Green
nodes.description: The mint green color swatch from the Universed palette. Hex: #66D9A3, RGB: 102, 217, 163.

nodes.label: Color #D9CA66 - Golden Yellow
nodes.description: The golden yellow color swatch from the Universed palette. Hex: #D9CA66, RGB: 217, 202, 102.

nodes.label: Color #D97566 - Terracotta/Coral
nodes.description: The terracotta/coral color swatch from the Universed palette. Hex: #D97566, RGB: 217, 117, 102.

nodes.label: Color #6E6A84 - Muted Purple-Gray
nodes.description: The muted purple-gray color swatch from the Universed palette. Hex: #6E6A84, RGB: 110, 106, 132.

nodes.label: Adobe Color - color.adobe.com
nodes.description: The color palette screenshot was captured from Adobe Color (color.adobe.com), a tool for creating and sharing color palettes.
